positive: A minimalist, symmetrical line-art illustration of a cosmic forest scene. The composition should feature stylized, bioluminescent trees with delicate, organic branching patterns and glowing flora, set against a deep indigo and teal gradient background. Focus on sharp silhouettes and negative space, giving the artwork a clean, tattoo-like aesthetic. Emphasize clean lines, strong contrast between the black ink and the background, and a central, balanced composition suitable for printing on apparel. Studio quality, vector art style, highly detailed, zentangle patterns elements integrated into the foliage.
negative: blurry, noisy, amateur, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, malformed, grain, artifact, low contrast, chromatic aberration
